inputs.label: standard
inputs.document: Annual police use-of-force report, 84 pages, published by the city police department
inputs.table: Summary table on pages 22-24 showing use-of-force incidents by precinct. Approximately 25 rows (one per precinct) and 7 columns: Precinct, Total Incidents, Firearm Discharge, Taser Use, Physical Force, Complaints Filed, Officers Involved. Table spans three pages with header repeating.
inputs.use: Compare precincts to identify which have disproportionately high use-of-force rates relative to calls for service

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.document: City council meeting minutes PDF, 12 pages
inputs.table: Voting record table on page 8. 10 rows (one per agenda item), 5 columns: Item Number, Description, Yes Votes, No Votes, Result.

inputs.label: european
inputs.document: European Commission annual report on farm subsidy distribution, 120-page PDF in English
inputs.table: Table on pages 45-52 showing subsidy payments by EU member state. 27 rows (one per state) and 8 columns: Member State, Direct Payments (EUR), Rural Development (EUR), Market Measures (EUR), Total (EUR), Share of EU Total (%), Per Hectare Rate (EUR), Year-on-Year Change (%). Table spans 8 pages with headers repeating on each page. Some cells contain footnote markers (superscript numbers).
inputs.use: Analyse which member states receive the most per hectare and whether the distribution is becoming more or less equal over time
